title: gonolobus lasiostemma
intro: Gonolobus lasiostemma, also known as the 'Mexican prickly apple', is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gonolobus lasiostemma include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Gonolobus lasiostemma typically involve drying the plant material and infusing it in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
